title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MedPlus is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!
